The '''Sith assassin pistol''' was an ancient tool used by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] to dispatch people quickly without alerting the target of the person's presence. The power setting could be adjusted to allow for quick or a lingering death. These were the same weapons that were used during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] which proved to be quite popular at the time.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
